component.name: WispTerm
component.summary: Terminal workspace for remote development and AI agent workflows

description.p: WispTerm is a cross-platform terminal workspace, written in Zig and powered by libghostty-vt for terminal emulation. It is built for remote development and AI agent workflows.

ul.li: Tabs and splittable panes with GPU-accelerated rendering
Built-in file explorer and AI copilot
Themes, configurable keybindings, and CJK/font support via fontconfig

description.p: Hides SSH browser tunnel helper windows, strengthens diagnostics, and adds Copilot and WeChat workflow improvements.
Adds in-session AI model switching, improves Copilot discoverability, and fixes tmux/SSH preview paths plus macOS Intel crash paths.
Improves SSH folder upload/download support, adds terminal click downloads for remote directories, and hardens SSH/Agent edge cases.
First Linux release: SDL3 host, fontconfig fonts with CJK, IME, and clipboard/cursor/notifications/file-dialog services.
